title: Current Location
area: Old Ticket Arcade - Ren's Back Room
description: A pressure chamber below the old break where black water hangs in impossible depth, silver echo-sparks choose their own paths, and the severed core listens without command.
nexus_patrol: moderate on main streets, lighter in back alleys

exits.back: Open threshold to the drowned pump cathedral and witness group
exits.inward: The listening pressure around the severed core
